title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Aparna Constructions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Aparna Constructions
jsonLd.description:
Aparna Constructions has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aparna Constructions:
Aparna Constructions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aparna Constructions!
